posts.author: Kate.wyeth (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please can there be more granular options when filtering by date. They get sorted by ‘this week’, ‘next week’, ‘today’ etc. but that’s not replicated when you filter the dates - I want a view that just shows last week, this week, and next week but that isn’t possible. It would also be great to be able to filter by date range or by month, a bit like you can do in Excel.

What are you trying to achieve

Being able to have a more bespoke and specific filtering of items in a date range. This will also help with reporting in a date range.
